text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe he just flew out of my room like
that!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: If anyone finds him, I'm gonna be in big trouble!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a large bird perched atop the dorm,
watching El Condor Pasa.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
There you are! Wait right there, Mambo! You
better not move from that spot!
